title: Ubiquiti ES-24-LITE, EdgeSwitch ES-24-Lite
description: Ubiquiti EdgeSwitch ES-24-Lite Gigabit L2 switch in 19" rackmount design, L3 routing functions and maximum power consumption of 25W . Manageable switch with 24 Gigabit copper ports + 2 Gigabit SFP ports and total throughput of 52Gbps The great advantages of the switch are quiet operation , since it does not include any fan and the possibility of redundant power via direct DC power connector. Switch supports power supply over 230V AC and through DC connector with variable power supply from 16 to 25V Thanks to the highly sophisticated EdgeOS operating system, it is possible to use basic switch functions and advanced features such as VLAN configuration, RSTP, Link aggregation, DHCP snooping , RADIUS authentication and routing Device Rackmount screw kit Power cord
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (24) 10/100/1000Mbps Optical interfaces (2) 1000Mbps Serial port RJ45 Power Power type DC connector, Mains power (230V) Redundant power supply Yes Max. power consumption [W] 25 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC, 16 .. 25V DC Physical characteristics Design Rackmount Fans No Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Width [mm] 440 Height [mm] 43 Depth [mm] 221 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 26 MAC address table 16000 Packet forwarding rate [Mpps] 38,69
